title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run real software with full infrastructure access including databases, storage, terminal, SSH, GitHub, AWS integration, and one-click HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live application deployment.
